_publications._publicationTitle: Development of 3D culture models of plexiform neurofibroma and initial application for phenotypic characterization and drug screening

_contextSnippet: Cell lines grown in 3D conditions showed varying degrees of resistance to the inhibitory actions of all three drugs
details: 3D culture conferred broad drug resistance compared to 2D: wild-type Schwann cells became resistant to selumetinib (MEK inhibitor); all lines showed very significant resistance to picropodophyllin (IGF-1R inhibitor); LDN-193189 (BMP2 inhibitor) was the most effective agent in 3D with only slightly reduced potency vs 2D, fully inhibiting all lines at 8 μM
